Name: ULevelStreaming
Description:
Abstract base class of container object encapsulating data required for streaming and providing 
  interface for when a level should be streamed in and out of memory.

Variables.Name: PackageName_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: Deprecated name of the package containing the level to load. Use GetWorldAsset() or GetWorldAssetPackageFName() instead.

Variables.Name: WorldAsset
Variables.Description: The reference to the world containing the level to load

Variables.Name: PackageNameToLoad
Variables.Description: If this isn't Name_None, then we load from this package on disk to the new package named PackageName

Variables.Name: LODPackageNames
Variables.Description: LOD versions of this level

Variables.Name: LevelTransform
Variables.Description: Transform applied to actors after loading.

Variables.Name: bShouldBeVisibleInEditor
Variables.Description: Whether this level should be visible in the Editor

Variables.Name: bLocked
Variables.Description: Whether this level is locked; that is, its actors are read-only.

Variables.Name: bShouldBeLoaded
Variables.Description: Whether the level should be loaded

Variables.Name: bShouldBeVisible
Variables.Description: Whether the level should be visible if it is loaded

Variables.Name: bIsStatic
Variables.Description:
Whether this level only contains static actors that aren't affected by gameplay or replication.
	  If true, the engine can make certain optimizations and will add this level to the StaticLevels collection.

Variables.Name: bShouldBlockOnLoad
Variables.Description: Whether we want to force a blocking load

Variables.Name: LevelLODIndex
Variables.Description: Requested LOD. Non LOD sub-levels have Index = -1

Variables.Name: bDisableDistanceStreaming
Variables.Description:
Whether this level streaming object should be ignored by world composition distance streaming, 
	   so streaming state can be controlled by other systems (ex: in blueprints)

Variables.Name: bDrawOnLevelStatusMap
Variables.Description: If true, will be drawn on the 'level streaming status' map (STAT LEVELMAP console command)

Variables.Name: DrawColor_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: Deprecated level color used for visualization.

Variables.Name: LevelColor
Variables.Description: The level color used for visualization. (Show -> Advanced -> Level Coloration)

Variables.Name: EditorStreamingVolumes
Variables.Description: The level streaming volumes bound to this level.

Variables.Name: MinTimeBetweenVolumeUnloadRequests
Variables.Description: Cooldown time in seconds between volume-based unload requests.  Used in preventing spurious unload requests.

Variables.Name: Keywords
Variables.Description: List of keywords to filter on in the level browser

Variables.Name: LoadedLevel
Variables.Description: Pointer to Level object if currently loaded streamed in.

Variables.Name: PendingUnloadLevel
Variables.Description: Pointer to a Level object that was previously active and was replaced with a new LoadedLevel (for LOD switching)

Variables.Name: UnloadingLevels
Variables.Description: Array to save unloading levels.

Variables.Name: FolderPath
Variables.Description:
The folder path for this level within the world browser. This is only available in editor builds. 
		A NONE path indicates that it exists at the root. It is '' separated.

Functions.Name: GetWorldAssetPackageFName
Functions.Description: Gets the package name for the world asset referred to by this level streaming as an FName

Functions.Name: GetLoadedLevel
Functions.Description: Gets a pointer to the LoadedLevel value

Functions.Name: IsLevelVisible
Functions.Description: Returns whether streaming level is visible

Functions.Name: IsLevelLoaded
Functions.Description: Returns whether streaming level is loaded

Functions.Name: IsStreamingStatePending
Functions.Description: Returns whether level has streaming state change pending

Functions.Name: CreateInstance
Functions.Description: Creates a new instance of this streaming level with a provided unique instance name

Functions.Name: GetLevelScriptActor
Functions.Description: Returns the Level Script Actor of the level if the level is loaded and valid

Delegate.Name: OnLevelLoaded
Delegate.Description: Called when level is streamed in

Delegate.Name: OnLevelUnloaded
Delegate.Description: Called when level is streamed out

Delegate.Name: OnLevelShown
Delegate.Description: Called when level is added to the world

Delegate.Name: OnLevelHidden
Delegate.Description: Called when level is removed from the world
